children.heading: .—Requirement for Request for Funds for Development
children.label: a .—Requirement for Request for Funds for Development
A
children.text: shall specifically request funds for such activities in the budget of the President for that fiscal year under ; andsection 1105(a) of title 31

children.label: B
children.text: may carry out such activities only if amounts are authorized to be appropriated for such activities by an Act of Congress consistent with section 660 of the Department of Energy Organization Act ().42 U.S.C. 7270

children.label: A
children.text: The conduct, or provision for conduct, of research and development for the production of a new nuclear weapon by the United States.

children.label: B
children.text: The conduct, or provision for conduct, of engineering or manufacturing to carry out the production of a new nuclear weapon by the United States.

children.label: C
children.text: The conduct, or provision for conduct, of research and development for the production of a modified nuclear weapon by the United States.

children.label: D
children.text: The conduct, or provision for conduct, of engineering or manufacturing to carry out the production of a modified nuclear weapon by the United States.

children.heading: .—Budget Request Format
children.label: b .—Budget Request Format
children.text: In a request for funds under subsection (a), the Secretary shall include a dedicated line item for each activity described in subsection (a)(2) for a new nuclear weapon or modified nuclear weapon that is in phase 2 or higher or phase 6.2 or higher (as the case may be) of the nuclear weapon acquisition process.

children.heading: .—Notification and Briefing of Noncovered Activities
children.label: c .—Notification and Briefing of Noncovered Activities

children.text: any activities described in subsection (a)(2) relating to the development of a new nuclear weapon or modified nuclear weapon that, during the calendar year prior to the budget submission, were carried out prior to phase 2 or phase 6.2 (as the case may be) of the nuclear weapon acquisition process; and

any plans to carry out, prior to phase 2 or phase 6.2 (as the case may be) of the nuclear weapon acquisition process, activities described in subsection (a)(2) relating to the development of a new nuclear weapon or modified nuclear weapon during the fiscal year covered by that budget.

children.label: A
children.text: is in the nuclear weapons stockpile as of ; andDecember 2, 2002

children.label: B
children.text: is being modified in order to meet a military requirement that is other than the military requirements applicable to such nuclear weapon when first placed in the nuclear weapons stockpile.

children.text: in the nuclear weapons stockpile on ; norDecember 2, 2002
